tasks.title: CI accessibility stage (axe-core + pa11y) + Prometheus counter + VPAT generation (S6-01, S6-08, S6-10)
tasks.prompt: FIRST: read spec/007-compliance-polish/{requirements.md, design.md, acceptance/compliance-polish.feature}. SECOND: extend .gitlab-ci.yml with an `accessibility` stage that builds the SPA + runs axe-core + pa11y against every primary view; fail on WCAG AAA violation; publish HTML artifact. (REQ-617) emit hub_accessibility_violations_total{view, severity} Prometheus counter via a small Go scrape job. (REQ-611/612) implement `make vpat` target that consumes axe-core JSON + generates docs/compliance/vpat.md mapping every view against EN 301 549 + Section 508.

tasks.title: Compose team broadcast + USMTF library 20+ templates + map clustering + contextual help (S6-02, S6-03, S6-04, S6-05)
tasks.prompt: FIRST: read spec/007-compliance-polish/{requirements.md, design.md, acceptance/compliance-polish.feature}. SECOND: (REQ-602/603/618) add Team-broadcast option to ComposeView calling POST /api/messages/send-to-group; empty group → inline error. (REQ-604) implement 20 new USMTF templates as Vue components under web/src/components/templates/ — see requirements.md REQ-604 list. Each template uses the existing usmtfPack helper from spec/005. (REQ-605) MapView gains leaflet-markercluster cluster rendering. (REQ-606) every Engineer-mode Settings field gets a v-tooltip.
tasks.acceptance_test: ssh ansible@nllei01androidsdk01 'cd /home/claude-runner/gitlab/products/cubeos/meshsat/web && npm install && npx playwright test --grep "team-broadcast|usmtf|map-cluster|settings-help"'

tasks.title: MLS RFC 9420 opt-in encryption + FIPS-140-3 build target (S6-06, S6-07)
tasks.prompt: FIRST: read spec/007-compliance-polish/{requirements.md, design.md}. SECOND: (REQ-607/608) implement internal/crypto/mls/ wrapping a Go MLS library (e.g. cisco-open/go-mls if available, else equivalent). Per-tenant feature flag `mls_enabled` from directory_dispatch_policy. Dispatcher checks flag + rejects unencrypted group sends when enabled. (REQ-609/610) Makefile `build-fips` target requires MESHSAT_FIPS=1 env var; links BoringSSL via cgo; prints opt-in notice; binary embeds build flag.

tasks.title: Android-to-Android contact handoff via QR + Playwright operator-contract suite (S6-09, S6-10)
tasks.prompt: FIRST: read spec/007-compliance-polish/{requirements.md, design.md}. SECOND: (REQ-613/614) implement direct Android-to-Android handoff QR — Android-side feature actually lives in meshsat-android/spec/002-directory-sync/, but bridge side adds POST /api/directory/contacts/{id}/android-share returning a TTL=300s CBOR card with source bridge pubkey. Bridge side reuses spec/006 handoff codec. (REQ-615/616) extend Playwright operator-contract suite to cover Compose/Inbox/People/Map/Radios; CI publishes video artifacts on failure.
tasks.acceptance_test: go test -count=1 -timeout 60s ./internal/api/... -run TestAndroidShare && ssh ansible@nllei01androidsdk01 'cd /home/claude-runner/gitlab/products/cubeos/meshsat/web && npm install && npx playwright test --config=operator-contract'
